notes:
# FileLens v1.1.2

## 中文

### ✨ 新功能

- **列表视图新增「修改时间」列** — 可点列头排序;默认显示,可在列头右键菜单里勾选隐藏。
- **列表表头支持拖拽换位置** — 跟 Finder 同款交互;右键列头可勾选显示/隐藏除「名称」外的任意列。强制至少 3 列可见,避免误操作把表格勾成空。布局自动持久化,跨启动保留。
- **⌘F 快速聚焦搜索框** — 主窗口任意位置按 ⌘F,焦点直接抢到工具栏搜索框。
- **侧栏文件夹右键「在 Finder 中打开」** — 文件夹丢失时不静默,会弹 Toast 提示。
- **文件夹设置弹窗重做** — 系统 Settings 同款的图标 + 标签 toolbar 风格,分为「通用 / 范围 / 排除」三个 tab,布局更紧凑、上下不再有大块留白。

### 🎨 改进

- **列表分组跟随当前排序维度** — 之前不管按什么排序,section 头永远是「今天 / 昨天 / 本周」(基于添加时间);现在按「修改时间」排序时 section 按修改时间分桶,按「名称 / 大小 / 种类」等非时间字段排序时干脆不分组,平铺显示。
- 文件夹设置弹窗的 Save 按钮逻辑保持原状(随时可点),但移除了底部冗余的工作区名 footer,避免视觉嘈杂。

### ⚙️ 其他

- macOS 14 deployment target 不变,Cmd+F 焦点走 AppKit responder chain 兜底实现(`.searchFocused` API 是 macOS 15+,目标抬上去后可一行换掉)。

---

## English

### ✨ New

- **"Date Modified" column in the list view** — sortable; visible by default, hideable via the column-header right-click menu.
- **Drag-to-reorder column headers** — Finder-style; right-click header to toggle visibility for any column except Name. At least 3 columns are always kept visible to prevent emptying the table by mistake. Layout persists across launches.
- **⌘F focuses the search field** — anywhere in the main window, ⌘F snaps focus to the toolbar search.
- **"Open in Finder" right-click on sidebar folders** — toasts an error if the folder no longer exists, instead of silently doing nothing.
- **Folder Settings dialog redesign** — system Settings-style icon + label toolbar with three tabs (General / Scope / Exclude), tighter spacing, no more empty whitespace below content.

### 🎨 Improvements

- **List section grouping follows the active sort key** — previously the section headers (Today / Yesterday / This Week) were always based on Date Added regardless of sort. Now sorting by Date Modified buckets sections by modification date; sorting by Name / Size / Kind shows a flat single-section list with no date headers.
- Removed redundant workspace-name footer from the Folder Settings dialog for a cleaner look.

### ⚙️ Misc

- macOS 14 deployment target unchanged; ⌘F focus uses an AppKit responder-chain fallback (`.searchFocused` is macOS 15+; can be swapped in once the deployment target moves up).
